narrative:
Twinsburg 2-B (precinct in Summit County) has 954 registered voters, with 55.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.7%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.5 percentage points.
